turns.name: WARREN BURGER
turns.text: In 73-1475, Harris County Commissioners against Moore. For reasons stated in an opinion written by Mr. Justice Marshall, the judgment of the United States District Court -- a three-judge court is reversed and the case is remanded for further proceedings. Mr. Justice Douglas took no part in the consideration of the (Inaudible) case. Mr. Justice Douglas has filed a dissenting opinion in Harris County Commissioners.
